results.content:
import json, urllib.request
req = urllib.request.Request(
    'http://127.0.0.1:5000/sentiment',
    data=json.dumps({'text': 'I love this service! It is amazing.'}).encode(),
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
)
with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
    body = json.load(resp)
assert body['sentiment'] in {'positive', 'negative'}
assert set(body['confidence']) == {'positive', 'negative'}
assert isinstance(body['confidence']['positive'], float)
assert isinstance(body['confidence']['negative'], float)
print('positive-schema-ok')
PY
positive-schema-ok

steps.message: Execute [/bin/sh] python3 - <<'PY'

results.content:
import json, urllib.request, urllib.error
req = urllib.request.Request(
    'http://127.0.0.1:5000/sentiment',
    data=json.dumps({'text': 123}).encode(),
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    method='POST'
)
try:
    urllib.request.urlopen(req)
    raise SystemExit('expected HTTP 400')
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
    assert e.code == 400
    body = json.load(e)
    assert isinstance(body.get('error'), str) and body['error']
    print('error-schema-ok')
PY
error-schema-ok
